mood: Warm, supportive, professional wellness aesthetic - not clinical, not childish.

typography.strategy: Warm Humanist + Clean Geometric. Uses Outfit for headings for a friendly yet structured feel, and Work Sans for high legibility in body text.

layout_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Native mobile screens need breathing room to avoid feeling clinical or overwhelming.

buttons.primary: bg-[#9EAB97] rounded-xl py-4 px-6 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2EBE5] rounded-xl py-4 px-6 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#9EAB97] rounded-xl py-4 px-6 bg-transparent flex items-center justify-center

inputs.text: bg-[#FBF9F6] border border-[#E8E3DD] rounded-xl p-4 text-base text-[#2D3328]

bottom_navigation.container: bg-white border-t border-[#E8E3DD] pb-safe pt-2 flex-row justify-around items-center

energy_meter.description: A smooth, native touch-slider that snaps or transitions between 5 distinct color bands based on percentage.

auth.layout: Centered content with soft top illustration. Email/Password inputs + Google Login SSO button.
auth.onboarding: Multi-step flow. 'Take a test' or select explicitly from ADHD, Bipolar, Autism.

home.layout: Energy meter at the top (prominent), followed by the daily symptom checklist. Smooth scrolling list. 'Submit' button triggers reward fill animation and navigates.

tasks.layout: Checklist of tasks. Includes a floating or inline Music Player (Play/Pause/Skip) for admin-uploaded music.
tasks.timer_settings: Segmented control or dropdown for 5/10/15/20/25/30 min notification intervals.
tasks.logic: 10-minute minimum between task completions to prevent cheating.

rewards.layout: Central large visual puzzle piece (Flower Vase, Candy Jar, or Envelope). Progress bar showing 30-day fill status.
rewards.logic: When task is completed, an animation adds an item (e.g., 1 flower) to the jar. Once 30 days are filled, an admin notice triggers.

journal.layout: Large text area with auto-populated timestamp header (editable). List of recent entries below, syncing with symptom checks.

graphs.layout: Line chart or smooth spline showing symptom frequency and energy levels over time. Uses the energy meter colors for data points.

send.layout: Form to enter Doctor's email. Preview of the PDF/Chart to be sent.

images.description: Calming sand texture for auth or onboarding background headers.
Minimalist flower vase base for the reward graphic
Glass candy jar base for the reward graphic
Gift envelope base for the reward graphic

media.icons_strategy: Use Lucide-React-Native. Ensure stroke width is 1.5 to 2.0 for a delicate, professional look.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must use testID in kebab-case format.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a React Native Expo SDK 54 application. Do not use DOM elements like <div>, <span>, or <button>.
Instead, use React Native primitives like <View>, <Text>, <TextInput>, <TouchableOpacity>.
If using NativeWind, use the provided Tailwind classes via the 'className' prop. Otherwise, convert these classes to React Native StyleSheet objects.
Implement the 5-color Energy Meter touch-slider using a gesture handler or slider library that can map exact percentage values to the specified colors.
Set up 6 distinct tabs via @react-navigation/bottom-tabs: Home, Tasks, Rewards, Journal, Graphs, Send.
Use testID property instead of data-testid for end-to-end and component testing in React Native.
Use lucide-react-native for all iconography, maintaining a stroke width of 1.5-2.
For the Rewards graphics (flower vase, candy jar, envelope), use the provided placeholder images and implement absolute positioning logic to visually 'fill' them over the 30-day tracking period.
